spec.length_desc: 10-15 turns total, includes history-taking and exam

transcript:
HCP: hello, whats bothering you today
Patient: uh my knee hurts really bad like i fell over yesterday
HCP: fell over or twisted it?
Patient: probably twisted it but i slipped on a rug
HCP: any swelling or bruising
Patient: yeah there is some swelling and its pretty red
HCP: any pain at rest
Patient: yeah it hurts to put weight on it
HCP: any history of gout or arthritis?
Patient: no never had those issues
HCP: ok lets have a look, seems quite swollen and red
HCP: range of motion
Patient: its stiff and i can't bend it much
HCP: ok sounds like a knee sprain, maybe a bit of inflammation
HCP: i'll give you some ibuprofen and a sling, keep it elevated
HCP: come back tomorrow for a review

hpi.text: twisted knee, fell on rug, swelling, red, pain at rest, stiff
hpi.evidence_span: probably twisted it but i slipped on a rug

exam.text: quite swollen and red, stiff, limited range of motion

items.evidence_span: come back tomorrow for a review
